evals.prompt: Create a personal portfolio landing page with a retro pixel aesthetic. Include: a hero section with name and tagline, a skills section with stat cards, a projects grid with cards, and a contact section with action buttons. The page should support both English and Chinese text in pixel fonts. Use plain HTML and CSS.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file with retro pixel styling: cream background, bold dark borders on cards, pixel font for headings in both English and Chinese, purple accent buttons, Lucide icons, dark mode support, and proper semantic HTML.

assertions.name: html_file_exists
assertions.description: Generated HTML file exists and is non-empty

assertions.name: chinese_pixel_font_loaded
assertions.description: HTML includes Fusion Pixel 12px Monospaced SC font loading

assertions.name: english_pixel_font_loaded
assertions.description: HTML includes Press Start 2P font loading

assertions.name: chinese_text_present
assertions.description: Page contains actual Chinese characters in headings or labels

assertions.name: pixel_font_for_headings
assertions.description: Headings use the pixel font family (--font-pixel or equivalent)

assertions.name: dark_mode_support
assertions.description: HTML includes dark mode toggle or [data-theme='dark'] CSS

assertions.name: lucide_icons_used
assertions.description: Page uses Lucide icons (CDN or inline)

assertions.name: card_border_style
assertions.description: Cards use 2px solid border with visible border color

assertions.name: cream_background
assertions.description: Page background uses cream/off-white color (#FFFDF5 or similar)

assertions.name: purple_accent
assertions.description: Primary accent color is purple/indigo (#6366F1 or similar)

evals.prompt: Build a product page for a retro-themed online store. Include: a product header with title and price, feature cards with icons, a pricing table with comparison, tab navigation between 'Features' and 'Reviews', and action buttons. Output as a single HTML file with both English and Chinese content.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file with the retro pixel aesthetic applied to an e-commerce product page, including all specified components styled consistently with the design system and pixel fonts for both languages.

assertions.name: html_file_exists
assertions.description: Generated HTML file exists and is non-empty

assertions.name: chinese_pixel_font_loaded
assertions.description: HTML includes Fusion Pixel 12px Monospaced SC font loading

assertions.name: chinese_text_present
assertions.description: Page contains actual Chinese characters

assertions.name: tab_component
assertions.description: Page includes a tab navigation component

assertions.name: table_component
assertions.description: Page includes a pricing table or comparison table

assertions.name: card_components
assertions.description: Page includes feature cards with icons

assertions.name: dark_mode_support
assertions.description: HTML includes dark mode support

assertions.name: lucide_icons_used
assertions.description: Page uses Lucide icons

evals.prompt: Create a blog homepage with a retro pixel design. Include: a header with blog name and theme toggle, featured article cards with images (placeholder), a categories section with stat cards showing post counts, a recent posts table with titles/dates/tags, and pagination buttons. Use plain HTML/CSS.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file with retro pixel styling applied to a blog interface with pixel font headings in both English and Chinese, proper accessibility features, and dark mode support.

assertions.name: html_file_exists
assertions.description: Generated HTML file exists and is non-empty

assertions.name: chinese_pixel_font_loaded
assertions.description: HTML includes Fusion Pixel 12px Monospaced SC font loading

assertions.name: chinese_text_present
assertions.description: Page contains actual Chinese characters

assertions.name: header_with_theme_toggle
assertions.description: Page includes a header with theme toggle button

assertions.name: stat_cards
assertions.description: Page includes stat cards showing category post counts

assertions.name: table_component
assertions.description: Page includes a recent posts table

assertions.name: dark_mode_support
assertions.description: HTML includes dark mode support

assertions.name: lucide_icons_used
assertions.description: Page uses Lucide icons
